sentences.target: Je dois apporter mon certificat médical.

translations.fr: Je dois apporter mon certificat médical.
translations.en: I have to bring my medical certificate.
translations.es: Tengo que traer mi certificado médico.
translations.de: Ich muss mein ärztliches Attest mitbringen.
translations.it: Devo portare il mio certificato medico.
translations.zh-Hans: 我必须带上我的医疗证明。
translations.yue: 我需要帶我的醫生證明。
translations.he: אני צריך להביא את האישור הרפואי שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi phải mang giấy chứng nhận sức khỏe của mình.
translations.nl: Ik moet mijn medische verklaring meenemen.
translations.hi: मुझे अपना चिकित्सा प्रमाणपत्र लाना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να φέρω το ιατρικό μου πιστοποιητικό.
translations.nb: Jeg må ta med legeattesten min.
translations.id: Saya harus membawa surat keterangan medis saya.
translations.sv: Jag måste ta med mitt läkarintyg.
translations.ro: Trebuie să aduc certificatul meu medical.
translations.ja: 診断書を持って行かなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 1st person singular, expressing obligation.
Infinitive main verb, complement of the modal 'devoir'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'certificat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'apporter'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifies 'certificat'.

sentences.target: Je connais un centre médical près d'ici.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔnɛ œ̃ sɑ̃tʁ medikal pʁɛ disi/

translations.fr: Je connais un centre médical près d'ici.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔnɛ œ̃ sɑ̃tʁ medikal pʁɛ disi/
translations.en: I know a medical center nearby.
translations.es: Conozco un centro médico cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Ich kenne ein medizinisches Zentrum in der Nähe.
translations.it: Conosco un centro medico qui vicino.
translations.ko: 이 근처에 있는 의료센터를 알고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我知道附近有一家医疗中心。
translations.yue: 我識一間近嘅醫療中心。
translations.pt: Conheço um centro médico aqui perto.
translations.he: אני מכיר מרכז רפואי בקרבת מקום.
translations.tr: Buraya yakın bir tıp merkezi biliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi biết một trung tâm y tế ở gần đây.
translations.ar: أعرف مركزًا طبيًا قريبًا من هنا.
translations.nl: Ik ken een medisch centrum hier in de buurt.
translations.hi: मुझे यहाँ के पास एक चिकित्सा केंद्र पता है.
translations.el: Ξέρω ένα ιατρικό κέντρο εδώ κοντά.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner et helsesenter i nærheten.
translations.id: Saya tahu pusat medis di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Jag känner till en vårdcentral här i närheten.
translations.ro: Știu un centru medical în apropiere.
translations.da: Jeg kender et sundhedscenter i nærheden.
translations.ja: この近くの医療センターを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces 'centre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifies 'centre'.
Preposition used in the fixed sequence 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; links 'près' to its complement.
Adverb functioning as the complement of 'de' in 'près d'ici' ('near here').

sentences.target: Ils attendent mon dossier médical à l'accueil.
sentences.reading: /il zatɑ̃d mɔ̃ dosje medikal a lakœj/

translations.fr: Ils attendent mon dossier médical à l'accueil.
translations.ipa: /il zatɑ̃d mɔ̃ dosje medikal a lakœj/
translations.en: They're waiting for my medical file at reception.
translations.es: En recepción están esperando mi expediente médico.
translations.de: An der Rezeption warten sie auf meine Patientenakte.
translations.it: Alla reception stanno aspettando la mia cartella clinica.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在接待处等我的病历。
translations.yue: 接待處喺等我嘅醫療檔案。
translations.ru: На стойке регистрации ждут мою медицинскую карту.
translations.pt: Na recepção estão à espera do meu prontuário médico.
translations.vi: Họ đang chờ hồ sơ y tế của tôi ở quầy lễ tân.
translations.nl: Bij de receptie wachten ze op mijn medisch dossier.
translations.uk: На рецепції чекають на мою медичну картку.
translations.hi: रिसेप्शन पर वे मेरे चिकित्सा फ़ाइल का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: W recepcji czekają na moją dokumentację medyczną.
translations.el: Στη ρεσεψιόν περιμένουν τον ιατρικό μου φάκελο.
translations.nb: I resepsjonen venter de på journalen min.
translations.id: Di resepsionis mereka menunggu berkas medis saya.
translations.sv: I receptionen väntar de på min journal.
translations.ro: La recepție așteaptă dosarul meu medical.
translations.cs: Na recepci čekají na mou zdravotní dokumentaci.
translations.da: I receptionen venter de på min journal.
translations.ja: 受付で私のカルテを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; transitive.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'dossier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'attendent'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifies 'dossier'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel, masculine singular, determines 'accueil'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Nous avons besoin d'un avis médical aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /nu avɔ̃ bəzwɛ̃ dœ̃ avi medikal oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Nous avons besoin d'un avis médical aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /nu avɔ̃ bəzwɛ̃ dœ̃ avi medikal oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: We need a medical opinion today.
translations.de: Wir brauchen heute eine ärztliche Einschätzung.
translations.it: Abbiamo bisogno di un parere medico oggi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天需要医生的意见。
translations.yue: 我哋今日需要醫療意見。
translations.pt: Precisamos de uma opinião médica hoje.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים חוות דעת רפואית היום.
translations.tr: Bugün tıbbi bir görüşe ihtiyacımız var.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần ý kiến bác sĩ hôm nay.
translations.nl: We hebben vandaag een medische beoordeling nodig.
translations.hi: हमें आज चिकित्सा राय की ज़रूरत है.
translations.nb: Vi trenger en medisinsk vurdering i dag.
translations.id: Kami membutuhkan pendapat medis hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi behöver en medicinsk bedömning idag.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de o opinie medicală astăzi.
translations.da: Vi har brug for en medicinsk vurdering i dag.
translations.ja: 今日、医師の意見が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; part of the light-verb construction 'avoir besoin de'.
Common noun; head of the fixed expression 'avoir besoin de' meaning 'to need'.
Elided preposition 'de' introducing the complement of 'besoin'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces 'avis'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'de' (object of the need).
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, modifies 'avis'.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause.
